_meta.what: REAL FCP PAETint transfer, tint Color=[1,0,0] Intensity=1, on grayscale inputs (isolated via uniform-colour inputs through transfer_batch.py).
_meta.why: Clean isolated data to decode the HgcTint hard-light two-leg transfer + its colour-space/gamma step (the documented ceiling in channel-mixer.ts). Better than prior photo-A probes (pipeline-coupled).
observations: R channel (tint=1): out=3.88*luma for luma<0.25, saturates ~255 by luma>=0.376. Fast highlight lift.
G/B channels (tint=0): ~0 until luma~0.4, then out≈2*luma-1 for luma>0.5 (sRGB shadow leg), with a smoothstep softening near the 0.5 threshold (matches prior RE note smoothstep(~0.27,~1.22,luma)).
Neither pure-sRGB nor pure-linear two-leg fit is exact; G matches sRGB 2*luma-1 well, R slope 3.88 needs leg-by-leg reconstruction.
_meta.next: Reconstruct each leg (shadow/highlight) with the correct sel/smoothstep in sRGB; the G(tint=0) shadow leg = 2*luma-1 is confirmed. Then fix tintFilter + nested Color read TOGETHER and verify Leaves stays >=22.44 on the GUI gate.
